default_filters: dv<=12 km/s, duration<=450 d, stay>=8 d, launch window 2020-2045, no H filter, no OCC filter
next_window_note: API provides next observation window (obs_start/obs_end), not a launch window; kept as nhats_obs_start/nhats_obs_end
note: living list - the retrieval datetime is the version
citation: NASA/JPL Near-Earth Object Human Space Flight Accessible Targets Study (NHATS), https://ssd-api.jpl.nasa.gov/nhats.api, retrieved 2026-07-07T14:47:45Z
